grade_notes: All 5 grading criteria met at full score: (1) 5 competitors with detailed profiles including 2025 revenue, specific product names (Universal Agent, Davis AI, OneAgent), market positions; (2) Professional market analysis with executive summary, strategic recommendations, and competitive comparison matrix; (3) 6 market trends discussed with competitive dynamics context (OTel, AI/ML, consolidation, cloud-native, pricing evolution, security-observability convergence); (4) Excellent structure with clear hierarchy, consistent table formatting, comparison matrix; (5) Specific pricing for all competitors including host-based, DDU-based, ingestion-based, consumption models, and free tiers.
